requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (RETIE + RETILAP + NTC/IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（RETIE + RETILAP + NTC/IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（RETIE + RETILAP + NTC/IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Colombian market must comply with the mandatory technical regulations RETIE (Reglamento Tecnico de Instalaciones Electricas) for electrical safety and RETILAP (Reglamento Tecnico de Iluminacion y Alumbrado Publico) for lighting products. Demonstration of conformity is through a Certificate of Conformity (Certificado de Conformidad) issued by a certification body accredited by ONAC (Organismo Nacional de Acreditacion de Colombia). The applicable product safety standard is NTC 2230 / IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), adopted by ICONTEC. Testing covers protection against electric shock, insulation, creepage and clearance, thermal protection, and mechanical strength, evaluated for the Colombian 110/220 V, 60 Hz supply. The importer registers the certificate and is subject to SIC (Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio) market surveillance.
summary.zh: 在哥伦比亚市场销售的 LED 灯具须符合强制性技术法规 RETIE（电气装置技术法规，电气安全）及 RETILAP（照明与公共照明技术法规，照明产品）。符合性证明通过由 ONAC（哥伦比亚国家认可机构）认可的认证机构出具的合格证书（Certificado de Conformidad）实现。适用产品安全标准为 ICONTEC 采纳的 NTC 2230 / IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验）。检测涵盖防触电、绝缘、爬电距离和电气间隙、热保护及机械强度，并按哥伦比亚 110/220 V、60 Hz 电源进行评估。进口商负责登记证书，并接受 SIC（工商监督管理局）市场监管。
summary.zht: 在哥倫比亞市場銷售的 LED 燈具須符合強制性技術法規 RETIE（電氣裝置技術法規，電氣安全）及 RETILAP（照明與公共照明技術法規，照明產品）。符合性證明通過由 ONAC（哥倫比亞國家認可機構）認可的認證機構出具的合格證書（Certificado de Conformidad）實現。適用產品安全標準為 ICONTEC 採納的 NTC 2230 / IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗）。檢測涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、爬電距離和電氣間隙、熱保護及機械強度，並按哥倫比亞 110/220 V、60 Hz 電源進行評估。進口商負責登記證書，並接受 SIC（工商監督管理局）市場監管。

standards_or_laws: RETIE — Reglamento Tecnico de Instalaciones Electricas (Ministerio de Minas y Energia, mandatory electrical technical regulation)
RETILAP — Reglamento Tecnico de Iluminacion y Alumbrado Publico (Ministerio de Minas y Energia, mandatory lighting technical regulation)
NTC 2230 / IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (ICONTEC adoption)
Certificate of Conformity issued by an ONAC-accredited certification body

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), aligned with IEC 60598-1. For luminaires sold in the Chinese residential market, mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA-C10-01 may apply, administered by CNCA and tested by CNCA-authorized laboratories. Chinese products are designed for the 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid. CCC certification covers safety aspects broadly comparable to IEC 60598-1, but the conformity assessment process, the 60 Hz / 110-220 V operating conditions, the Spanish-language documentation, and the Certificate of Conformity obligation are separate and non-mutual with Colombia's RETIE/RETILAP scheme.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），与 IEC 60598-1 对齐。在中国居民市场销售的灯具，可能须依据 CNCA-C10-01 取得强制性 CCC（中国强制性产品认证），由 CNCA 管理并由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。中国产品按 220/380 V、50 Hz 电网设计。CCC 认证涵盖与 IEC 60598-1 大致相当的安全要求，但合格评定程序、60 Hz / 110-220 V 运行条件、西班牙语文件及合格证书义务均独立，与哥伦比亚 RETIE/RETILAP 制度不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），與 IEC 60598-1 對齊。在中國居民市場銷售的燈具，可能須依據 CNCA-C10-01 取得強制性 CCC（中國強制性產品認證），由 CNCA 管理並由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。中國產品按 220/380 V、50 Hz 電網設計。CCC 認證涵蓋與 IEC 60598-1 大致相當的安全要求，但合格評定程序、60 Hz / 110-220 V 運行條件、西班牙語文件及合格證書義務均獨立，與哥倫比亞 RETIE/RETILAP 制度不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 60598-1)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Colombia requires a third-party Certificate of Conformity from an ONAC-accredited body for RETIE/RETILAP-covered luminaires — this is a different scheme from Chinese CCC and the two are non-mutual. Key gaps: (1) the product must be designed and tested for the Colombian 110/220 V, 60 Hz grid, not China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz — frequency-sensitive components (drivers, capacitors) and nominal voltage ratings must be verified; (2) documentation, marking, and the certificate are handled in Spanish; (3) an in-country importer is needed to register the Certificate of Conformity and act as the responsible party before SIC; (4) existing CN CCC test reports cannot be directly reused — testing to NTC 2230 / IEC 60598-1 by an ONAC-recognised or ILAC MRA laboratory at Colombian operating conditions is generally required. RETILAP also imposes lighting-performance and labelling content specific to the Colombian regulation.
gap.zh: 哥伦比亚对 RETIE/RETILAP 涵盖灯具要求由 ONAC 认可机构出具第三方合格证书——这与中国 CCC 是不同制度，二者不互认。主要差距：（1）产品须按哥伦比亚 110/220 V、60 Hz 电网设计和检测，而非中国 220/380 V、50 Hz——对频率敏感的元件（驱动器、电容）及额定电压须核验；（2）文件、标志及证书以西班牙语处理；（3）须有在地进口商办理合格证书登记并作为 SIC 面前的责任方；（4）现有中国 CCC 检测报告不可直接复用——通常须由 ONAC 认可或 ILAC MRA 实验室按哥伦比亚运行条件依 NTC 2230 / IEC 60598-1 检测。RETILAP 还规定了哥伦比亚法规特有的照明性能及标签内容。
gap.zht: 哥倫比亞對 RETIE/RETILAP 涵蓋燈具要求由 ONAC 認可機構出具第三方合格證書——這與中國 CCC 是不同制度，二者不互認。主要差距：（1）產品須按哥倫比亞 110/220 V、60 Hz 電網設計和檢測，而非中國 220/380 V、50 Hz——對頻率敏感的元件（驅動器、電容）及額定電壓須核驗；（2）文件、標誌及證書以西班牙語處理；（3）須有在地進口商辦理合格證書登記並作為 SIC 面前的責任方；（4）現有中國 CCC 檢測報告不可直接複用——通常須由 ONAC 認可或 ILAC MRA 實驗室按哥倫比亞運行條件依 NTC 2230 / IEC 60598-1 檢測。RETILAP 還規定了哥倫比亞法規特有的照明性能及標籤內容。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Certificate of Conformity demonstrating RETIE/RETILAP compliance (via an ONAC-accredited body, tested to NTC/IEC 60598-1) required before placing LED luminaires on the Colombian market
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire is within CNCA-C10-01 scope; GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1 is the applicable safety standard

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energia de Colombia (RETILAP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires entering Colombia require a Certificate of Conformity demonstrating compliance with the mandatory RETIE/RETILAP technical regulations, issued through an ONAC-accredited body and tested to NTC 2230 / IEC 60598-1 at Colombian 110/220 V, 60 Hz conditions. Chinese CCC certification and GB 7000.1 evidence do not satisfy the Colombian pathway, and the 50 Hz / 220-380 V design basis must be re-verified for the 60 Hz / 110-220 V Colombian grid. An in-country importer registers the certificate and is the responsible party before SIC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入哥伦比亚的 LED 灯具须取得证明符合强制性 RETIE/RETILAP 技术法规的合格证书，由 ONAC 认可机构出具，并按哥伦比亚 110/220 V、60 Hz 条件依 NTC 2230 / IEC 60598-1 检测。中国 CCC 认证及 GB 7000.1 证据不满足哥伦比亚路径，且 50 Hz / 220-380 V 设计基础须针对 60 Hz / 110-220 V 哥伦比亚电网重新核验。在地进口商负责登记证书并作为 SIC 面前的责任方。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入哥倫比亞的 LED 燈具須取得證明符合強制性 RETIE/RETILAP 技術法規的合格證書，由 ONAC 認可機構出具，並按哥倫比亞 110/220 V、60 Hz 條件依 NTC 2230 / IEC 60598-1 檢測。中國 CCC 認證及 GB 7000.1 證據不滿足哥倫比亞路徑，且 50 Hz / 220-380 V 設計基礎須針對 60 Hz / 110-220 V 哥倫比亞電網重新核驗。在地進口商負責登記證書並作為 SIC 面前的責任方。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamps and Performance (NTC/IEC 62560 + RETILAP)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯及性能（NTC/IEC 62560 + RETILAP）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈及性能（NTC/IEC 62560 + RETILAP）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (integrated retrofit bulbs) for the Colombian market are evaluated against IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications), adopted through ICONTEC as NTC, and against the RETILAP technical regulation, which sets lighting-performance, photometric, and labelling requirements for lamps and luminaires. RETILAP specifies content such as luminous flux, luminous efficacy, correlated colour temperature, colour rendering index, and rated life that must be declared. Conformity is demonstrated through a Certificate of Conformity from an ONAC-accredited body, with the products rated for the Colombian 110/220 V, 60 Hz supply. The SIC enforces these requirements at customs and in-market.
summary.zh: 面向哥伦比亚市场的自镇流 LED 灯（一体化替换灯泡）须依据通过 ICONTEC 采纳为 NTC 的 IEC 62560（电压 > 50 V 的普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）及 RETILAP 技术法规进行评估，后者为灯和灯具规定照明性能、光度及标签要求。RETILAP 规定须声明的内容包括光通量、光效、相关色温、显色指数及额定寿命。符合性通过 ONAC 认可机构出具的合格证书证明，产品按哥伦比亚 110/220 V、60 Hz 电源额定。SIC 在海关及市场内执行上述要求。
summary.zht: 面向哥倫比亞市場的自鎮流 LED 燈（一體化替換燈泡）須依據通過 ICONTEC 採納為 NTC 的 IEC 62560（電壓 > 50 V 的普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）及 RETILAP 技術法規進行評估，後者為燈和燈具規定照明性能、光度及標籤要求。RETILAP 規定須聲明的內容包括光通量、光效、相關色溫、顯色指數及額定壽命。符合性通過 ONAC 認可機構出具的合格證書證明，產品按哥倫比亞 110/220 V、60 Hz 電源額定。SIC 在海關及市場內執行上述要求。

standards_or_laws: NTC / IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications (ICONTEC adoption)
RETILAP — Reglamento Tecnico de Iluminacion y Alumbrado Publico (photometric and labelling content requirements)
Certificate of Conformity issued by an ONAC-accredited certification body

summary.en: China's equivalent for self-ballasted LED lamp safety is GB 24906 / GB/T 24906 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety requirements), aligned with IEC 62560, with performance addressed by GB/T 24908. Energy efficiency of LED lamps is covered by GB 30255 (China Energy Label). CCC may apply to certain lamp categories. Chinese lamps are rated for 220 V, 50 Hz. The Chinese certification and labelling content (China Energy Label grade, GB markings) differs in format and declared parameters from the RETILAP-required photometric declaration and RETIQ label, and there is no mutual recognition with the Colombian Certificate of Conformity.
summary.zh: 中国自镇流 LED 灯安全的对应标准为 GB 24906 / GB/T 24906（电压 > 50 V 的普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），与 IEC 62560 对齐，性能由 GB/T 24908 规定。LED 灯能效由 GB 30255（中国能效标识）涵盖。特定灯类别可能适用 CCC。中国灯具按 220 V、50 Hz 额定。中国认证及标签内容（中国能效标识等级、GB 标志）在格式及声明参数上不同于 RETILAP 要求的光度声明及 RETIQ 标签，且与哥伦比亚合格证书无互认。
summary.zht: 中國自鎮流 LED 燈安全的對應標準為 GB 24906 / GB/T 24906（電壓 > 50 V 的普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），與 IEC 62560 對齊，性能由 GB/T 24908 規定。LED 燈能效由 GB 30255（中國能效標識）涵蓋。特定燈類別可能適用 CCC。中國燈具按 220 V、50 Hz 額定。中國認證及標籤內容（中國能效標識等級、GB 標誌）在格式及聲明參數上不同於 RETILAP 要求的光度聲明及 RETIQ 標籤，且與哥倫比亞合格證書無互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906 / GB/T 24906 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
GB/T 24908 — Performance requirements for self-ballasted LED lamps (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: The safety bases (IEC 62560 vs GB 24906) are largely harmonised, so the technical content gap is moderate, but the compliance gap is significant: (1) a Colombian Certificate of Conformity from an ONAC-accredited body is required and CN evidence is not transferable; (2) lamps must be rated and tested for 110/220 V, 60 Hz — a 220 V/50 Hz-only lamp may not be acceptable; (3) RETILAP requires specific photometric parameters (luminous flux, efficacy, CCT, CRI, rated life) to be declared on labelling in the regulation's format, which differs from the China Energy Label content; (4) the RETIQ energy label (see ledco-ecodesign rows) is a separate mandatory marking for in-scope lighting; (5) Spanish-language labelling and an in-country importer are required. Manufacturers should plan retesting and label redesign rather than relabelling CN-market stock.
gap.zh: 安全基础（IEC 62560 与 GB 24906）基本协调，故技术内容差距适中，但合规差距显著：（1）须由 ONAC 认可机构出具哥伦比亚合格证书，中国证据不可转用；（2）灯具须按 110/220 V、60 Hz 额定和检测——仅 220 V/50 Hz 的灯可能不被接受；（3）RETILAP 要求按法规格式在标签上声明特定光度参数（光通量、光效、色温、显色指数、额定寿命），与中国能效标识内容不同；（4）RETIQ 能效标签（见 ledco-ecodesign 行）是适用照明的独立强制标识；（5）须西班牙语标签及在地进口商。制造商应规划重新检测和标签重新设计，而非对中国市场库存重新贴标。
gap.zht: 安全基礎（IEC 62560 與 GB 24906）基本協調，故技術內容差距適中，但合規差距顯著：（1）須由 ONAC 認可機構出具哥倫比亞合格證書，中國證據不可轉用；（2）燈具須按 110/220 V、60 Hz 額定和檢測——僅 220 V/50 Hz 的燈可能不被接受；（3）RETILAP 要求按法規格式在標籤上聲明特定光度參數（光通量、光效、色溫、顯色指數、額定壽命），與中國能效標識內容不同；（4）RETIQ 能效標籤（見 ledco-ecodesign 行）是適用照明的獨立強制標識；（5）須西班牙語標籤及在地進口商。製造商應規劃重新檢測和標籤重新設計，而非對中國市場庫存重新貼標。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — self-ballasted LED lamps require a Certificate of Conformity (ONAC-accredited body, NTC/IEC 62560) and must meet RETILAP photometric and labelling content before market placement in Colombia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory / partly mandatory — GB 24906 safety applies; CCC may apply to certain lamp categories; China Energy Label (GB 30255) required for in-scope lamps

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energia de Colombia (RETILAP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps for Colombia need a Certificate of Conformity tested to NTC/IEC 62560 through an ONAC-accredited body, plus RETILAP-format photometric declarations and labelling, all rated for 110/220 V, 60 Hz. The safety basis is largely harmonised with China's GB 24906, but CN certification, the China Energy Label, and 50 Hz/220 V ratings do not satisfy the Colombian pathway. Plan for retesting at Colombian conditions and Spanish-language label redesign rather than reusing CN-market documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向哥伦比亚的自镇流 LED 灯须通过 ONAC 认可机构依 NTC/IEC 62560 检测取得合格证书，并具备 RETILAP 格式的光度声明及标签，全部按 110/220 V、60 Hz 额定。安全基础与中国 GB 24906 基本协调，但中国认证、中国能效标识及 50 Hz/220 V 额定不满足哥伦比亚路径。应规划按哥伦比亚条件重新检测及西班牙语标签重新设计，而非复用中国市场文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向哥倫比亞的自鎮流 LED 燈須通過 ONAC 認可機構依 NTC/IEC 62560 檢測取得合格證書，並具備 RETILAP 格式的光度聲明及標籤，全部按 110/220 V、60 Hz 額定。安全基礎與中國 GB 24906 基本協調，但中國認證、中國能效標識及 50 Hz/220 V 額定不滿足哥倫比亞路徑。應規劃按哥倫比亞條件重新檢測及西班牙語標籤重新設計，而非複用中國市場文件。
